# TaskyAI

> AI task planner that converts your morning brief into structured, prioritized tasks with subtasks and categories.

## What is TaskyAI?

TaskyAI is an AI-powered task planning tool that reads your plain-language brief and automatically generates structured, prioritized tasks with subtasks, categories (Work, Personal, Health, Learning), and priority levels (high, medium, low). It reduces morning planning time by up to 90%.

## How it works

1. **Type your brief** — Share what you need to accomplish in plain language. No templates, no forms, no formatting required.
2. **AI organizes it** — Tasky reads your brief, detects categories and priorities, and generates structured tasks with subtasks automatically.
3. **Get structured tasks** — Walk away with a fully organized task list. Priorities set, subtasks created, categories assigned. Start doing, not planning.

## Key features

- AI-powered task breakdown from plain language briefs
- Smart categorization (Work, Personal, Health, Learning)
- Priority detection (high, medium, low)
- Subtask generation
- Chat history with context recovery
- File context (PDF, DOCX, spreadsheet upload)

## Pricing

See [pricing.md](/pricing.md) for full pricing details.
